_disclaimer: DEMO CONTENT — synthetic data for local development and demos only. Not derived from real assessments.
content:
title: Supply Chain Attestation to ISO 27001 Mapping
metadata:
  type: MappingDocument
  id: sca-iso27001
  gemara-version: 1.0.0
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Maps supply chain attestation controls to ISO 27001:2022 Annex A controls
  author:
    id: complytime
    name: ComplyTime
    type: Software Assisted
  mapping-references:
    - id: supply-chain-attestation
      title: Supply Chain Attestation Controls
      version: 1.0.0
    - id: iso27001-2022
      title: ISO/IEC 27001:2022
      version: '2022'
source-reference:
  entry-type: Control
  reference-id: supply-chain-attestation
target-reference:
  entry-type: AssessmentRequirement
  reference-id: iso27001-2022
mappings:
  - id: sca1-to-iso
    source: SCA-1
    relationship: supports
    targets:
      - entry-id: A.8.9
        strength: 8
        confidence-level: High
        rationale: >-
          SBOM generation supports A.8.9 Configuration management by
          documenting all software components in deployed artifacts.
      - entry-id: A.8.28
        strength: 7
        confidence-level: Medium
        rationale: >-
          SBOM supports A.8.28 Secure coding by providing visibility
          into third-party dependencies.
  - id: sca2-to-iso
    source: SCA-2
    relationship: supports
    targets:
      - entry-id: A.8.25
        strength: 9
        confidence-level: High
        rationale: >-
          Build provenance directly supports A.8.25 Secure development
          life cycle by providing cryptographic proof of build origin.
  - id: sca3-to-iso
    source: SCA-3
    relationship: supports
    targets:
      - entry-id: A.8.28
        strength: 9
        confidence-level: High
        rationale: >-
          Dependency scanning directly implements A.8.28 Secure coding
          by identifying known vulnerabilities in dependencies.
      - entry-id: A.8.8
        strength: 7
        confidence-level: Medium
        rationale: >-
          Vulnerability scanning supports A.8.8 Management of technical
          vulnerabilities.
  - id: sca4-to-iso
    source: SCA-4
    relationship: supports
    targets:
      - entry-id: A.8.24
        strength: 8
        confidence-level: High
        rationale: >-
          Artifact signing supports A.8.24 Use of cryptography by
          applying cryptographic signatures to ensure integrity.
      - entry-id: A.8.25
        strength: 7
        confidence-level: Medium
        rationale: >-
          Signed artifacts support A.8.25 Secure development life cycle
          by ensuring artifact integrity in the release pipeline.
